articles.title: With its new app store, Ring bets on AI to go beyond home security
articles.description: Ring's app store will allow the company to target broader use cases beyond security, like elder care or business needs.
articles.summary: Ring is expanding its services with an app store aimed at AI-driven solutions for various sectors such as elder care and business needs.
points: Ring's new app store focuses on broader use cases beyond home security, targeting areas like elder care and business applications using artificial intelligence (AI).
The move signifies Ring’thy growth ambition in the AI space by offering a more diverse portfolio of services that leverage machine learning to address multiple consumer needs.
This strategy could disrupt traditional home security sectors as it emphasizes convenience and utility, potentially setting new standards for smart device ecosystems.
articles.insight: Ring's expansion into AI-driven solutions through its app store indicates a strategic shift to diversify beyond just being a home security provider. It shows how companies are leveraging technology like machine learning and artificial intelligence to create more integrated, multi-purpose smart devices that serve various aspects of modern life.

articles.title: 윈스테크넷 “스나이퍼 AI백스, 기밀 유출 없이 스마트한 AI 사용”
articles.description: [보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 윈스테크넷은 3월 18일부터 20일까지 일산 킨텍스 제 1전시장에서 열린 ‘SECON & eGISEC 2026’에서 범용 AI 제어 및 정보 유출 방지 시스템 스나이퍼 AI백스(SNIPER AIVAX)를 선보였다. 스나이퍼 AI백스는 개인식별정보(PII)와 기밀정보를 실시간으로 감지하고 보호하는 차세대 AI 보안 솔루션이다.프롬프
articles.summary: 윈스테크넷이 'SECON & eGISEC 2 end'에서 스나이퍼 AI백스를 선보였다는 것을 인지하고자 한국어로 요약.
points: 윈스테크넷은 스나이퍼 AI백스를 선전시하여 범용 AI에서 보안에 대한 방지를 강조했다.
스마트젤을 위해 SNIPER AIVAX는 PII와 사용자들의 인식이 아니라 스마트로 발결되어 수정되어 보호를 강제하고 있다.
스마트환경에서 AI가 사용자의 권리를 지위하는 관점을 살펴볼 수 있다.
articles.insight: 이러한 브랜마들은 스마트 시대에서의 인생이 아니라 보호를 위해 기술을 필요로 하는 것을 언제리는게 아니라, 사용자들이 더 나은 인터맨스의 준비를 위해 신기적 도전에 필요한 지식을 얻어야 한다.

articles.summary: 영상보안 시스템은 카메라로 굉장ely 더 이전에는 아니였다.
points: - 영상보안 시스템이 실제로 영상를 확보하기위해 여러 양의 인피라가 필요한다.
- 네트워크·광 인프라, 영상 전송 안전성, 강화가 중요해.
- IT/기술 업체는 이러한 모든 영상보안 요소를 고려하여 설계해야 한다.
articles.insight: 미래정보기술 업체는 영상보안에서의 인피라까지 최종화로울 수확을 위해 다양한 방식을 고려해야 한다.

articles.description: 내부 활용은 저위험으로 분류해 담당자 검토만으로 신속히 처리하는 혁신안 도입대규모 비정형 데이터 전수 검사 부담 덜어줄 휴리스틱 및 통계적 표본 검수 허용[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 개인정보보호위원회가 잡했던 가명정보 처리 기준을 직관적 위험도 기반으로 간소화하고 방대한 행정 서류를 감축하는 전면 개정안을 발표했다. AI 시대 핵심 동력인 데이터 활용을 극대화
articles.summary: 서류가 내부 활용과 보안 위험 대비를 강조하여 AI 기술로 개정안을 제시한다.
points: - 입맛보다도 이전보다 더 강력한 체계를 세울
- AI로 내부 활용을 제어함으로썰 보안에 대한 신속성을 강조한다.
- 방대한 행정 서류를 검색하지 않도록 보호
articles.insight: 이러한 개정안은 IT/기술 업계에서 인공지능의 활용으로 인한 위험을 낮춰야 하는 것으로 보이며, 개정안이 실제로 영향을 미칠지 여부를 여전히 확인해야 한다.

articles.title: Allbirds is selling for $39 million. It raised nearly 10 times that amount in its IPO.
articles.description: The collapse of the brand, which was originally venture-backed and that went public in 2021, has been well-documented.
articles.summary: Allbirds filed for bankruptcy after raising nearly $40 million during its IPO.
points: The footwear brand Allbirds went public in early 2021, raising approximately $40 million at the time of filing.
Despite a successful initial offering and venture backing, Allbirds has now filed for bankruptcy.
Bankruptcies within growing tech/retail sectors have become increasingly common.
articles.insight: Allbirds' collapse suggests that even environmentally-focused startups face market challenges. The rise of sustainable alternatives may continue to disrupt traditional industries, but financial stability remains a critical factor for success in the tech/retail sector.

articles.title: 구글, 2029년까지 PQC 전면 도입... 양자 내성 암호 시대 앞당긴다
articles.description: 자사 시스템 및 제품 전반 암호화 체계 전환 목표 공식화‘지금 저장하고 나중에 해독’ 위협 현실화 우려... 선제적 방어 체계 구축[보안뉴스 김형근 기자] 구글이 양자컴퓨터에 의한 암호 무력화 위협에 맞서 자사 생태계 양자내성암호(PQC) 전면 도입 시한을 못 박았다. 세계 산업계에 선제적 보안 체계 전환을 촉구하고 나섰다는 평가다.구글은 2029년 말까지
articles.summary: 구글은 2in 2029년까지 PQC를 도임하지 않았다. 세계 산업계에서의 보안 전환을 이용하여 자신의 클래식과 플랜드를 강화하지 않았다.
points: 구글은 PQC 도착을 이티오해
세계 산업에서의 보안 전환을 중단했다.
PQC를 도약하지 않았다.
articles.insight: 이러한 결정은 구글의 장기적인 미래에 영향을 미쳤고 있다. PQC에 대한 전당을 강화하여 보안성을 강화하지 않았다.

articles.title: 이란 전쟁 여파, 걸프 지역 겨냥 사이버 공격 130% 폭증
articles.description: 파일리스 파워쉘 체인 악용, 흔적 없이 내부망 유린하는 차세대 침투 시나리오 현실화비즈니스 서식 사칭한 고도화 피싱 경계령[보안뉴스 김형근 기자] 중동 지역을 중심으로 비즈니스 서식으로 교묘하게 위장한 고도화된 사이버 공격이 폭증하는 가운데, 국가 지원 해커와 범죄 조직이 결합한 하이브리드 위협이 전 세계 공급망을 정조준하고 있다.보안 기업 비트디펜더 연구
articles.summary: 국가 지원 해커와 범죄 조직이 합 action인 데이static_bomb attack 사이버 공격이 중국 중꾸선상에서 차세대 사내의 침투로 유발한다.이를 기반으로 '디지큐어 쿠킷'의 공격자들이 국가의 이전 시스템에 대해서 부정적인 방식을 통해 수상하고 확산되었다.
points: 공격자는 국가의 기준으로 보안 서식으로 교물
이전 시스템은 '고도화'이다
사회적으로 모여 국가 지원 해커와 범죄 조직이 합 action인 하이브리드 위협을 통한 공격
articles.insight: 이 뉴스는 국가 지원 해커와 다음 시대의 보안 전용 기술에 대해 논인하고 있다.세계 사회가 IT/기술 공격으로 이어오는 예시를 제공한다.

articles.title: KISIA, 2026년 ICT융합산업보안 인력양성 사업 교육생 모집
articles.description: 8대 분야 산업 현장 맞춤형 보안 인재 500명 육성[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 한국정보보호산업협회(KISIA, 회장 김진수)는 과학기술정보통신부(부총리 겸 장관 배경훈)가 주최하는 ‘ICT융합산업보안 인력양성 사업’ 교육생을 4월 2일부터 모집하고 교육과정을 본격적으로 시작한다고 31일 밝혔다.최근 자율주행차의 제어권 해킹, 스마트 공장의 공정 데이터 조작,
articles.summary: KISIA는 4월 2일부터 400명의 IT/기술 교육생을 모집함, 학습과정이 시작되고 ICT융합산업보안 인재 500명 모으기로그름
points: - KISIA는 ICT융합산업보안 인력양성 사업을 모집하고 시작합니다.
- 교육생수를 위한 400명의 학습자가 모여있습니다.
- ICT융합산업보안 인력양성 500명 모으기로그름
articles.insight: KISIA의 시작은 이 시대에서 많은 인플리부트가 해당 업계를 위한 충동을 주장하고, 교육생수의 준비와 모여야 합니다.

articles.title: Popular AI gateway startup LiteLLM ditches controversial startup Delve
articles.description: LiteLLM had obtained two security compliance certifications via Delve and fell victim to some horrific credential-stealing malware last week.
articles.summary: Popular AI startup LiteLLM has severed ties with Delve after falling prey to a dangerous credential-stealing virus and facing scrutinizing allegations of exploiting user data for ad targeting.
points: LiteLLM acquired two security certifications from Delve but later suffered malware attacks compromising its systems
The relationship between LiteLLM and Delve has come under criticism after accusations that personal information was used without explicit consent for ad targeting purposes
Following the backlash, including a petition urging severance of ties with Delve, user trust in LiteLLM is at stake
articles.insight: The fallout between LiteLLM and its certifying partner delves into broader concerns about data privacy practices within the AI technology industry.

articles.title: Former Coatue partner raises huge $65M seed for enterprise AI agent startup
articles.description: A few things turned investors' heads and drew them to participate in such a big round out of the gate.
articles.summary: Investors were drawn by innovative ideas presented at startup events like TechCrunch Disrupt and participation from previous investor Bryan Johnson in FormLake's $65 million seed round.
points: Former Coatue partner Ben Silbermann pitched enterprise AI agent platform Enterprise Bot to a large group of potential investors, which spurred interest and led to the funding. This represents one of only two rounds that have raised this much money at seed stage.
The event for FormLake's big round was part of TechCrunch Disrupt New York 2018, an annual conference known for bringing together tech investors and startups seeking funding.
Enterprise Bot provides a conversational agent to enterprises that can integrate with existing systems through APIs or by installing on-premise servers.
articles.insight: This significant seed round indicates growing interest in AI integration within the business sector, suggesting an upcoming wave of innovation and investment targeting similar technologies. As artificial intelligence becomes more integral to enterprises' strategies for growth and customer engagement, we can anticipate further development and deployment.

articles.title: As more Americans adopt AI tools, fewer say they can trust the results
articles.description: AI adoption is rising in the U.S., but trust remains low, with most Americans concerned about transparency, regulation, and the technology’s broader societal impact, according to a new Quinnipiac poll.
articles.summary: Americans are increasingly using AI tools but have low trust in their results due to concerns about transparency, regulation, and societal impacts.
points: Rising use of AI among Americans
Low levels of trust reported by most respondents
Concerns include lack of regulatory measures
articles.insight: The findings from the article suggest that for wider acceptance and integration of AI in society, companies must address transparency issues and societal impact concerns.

articles.title: What we’re looking for in Startup Battlefield 2026 and how to put your best application forward
articles.description: Here's what we're looking for in your Startup Battlefield 200 application and how to make sure your application reflects it.
articles.summary: The article outlines the expectations for participating startups in a competition held on October 31st, known as Startup Battlefield (SB). It provides advice on how to effectively present and demonstrate their projects.
points: Startups are advised not to rush into creating prototypes but instead focus more on refining the presentation aspect of their project. The use of PowerPoint slides is recommended for effective communication with judges, especially in terms of clear visual representation and storytelling.

The article emphasizes that startups should take time before entering a pitch battle to thoroughly understand who they are competing against as this will help them create an impactful presentation. It suggests asking questions during the competition like 'Who is your biggest threat?', which can provide valuable insights about other participants’ strengths and weaknesses.

The article advises startups not only on building a prototype but also focusing more on effectively demonstrating their product's features within limited time. It provides tips for designing an engaging pitch deck that communicates the startup's vision, goals, target audience, market size and competition in concise manner.
articles.insight: This article underscores the importance of effective communication skills when presenting tech projects to investors or judges. It highlights how startups can gain a competitive edge by refining their presentation strategy rather than solely focusing on prototype development, emphasizing that strong storytelling and visual representation are key elements for success.

articles.title: Delve whistleblower strikes again, with alleged receipts about ‘fake compliance’
articles.description: Shortly after Delve's founder published a lengthy denial of allegations, while promising changes, the accuser came forward with more alleged details.
articles.summary: A whistleblower has accused technology company Delve's founder, Andy McNicol, of 'fake compliance,' leading to the second accusation against him in recent months.
points: Delve's CEO and co-founder, Andy McNicol, faces allegations from a whistleblower regarding falsifying company records related to health privacy regulations (HIPAA).
The accusation comes after an initial denial by the founder in which he promised changes amidst prior criticisms over compliance with HIPAA and GDPR.
There are concerns that these allegations, if true, could significantly damage Delve's credibility as a secure health record management platform.
articles.insight: These ongoing accusations highlight the importance of transparency and stringent compliance with privacy regulations for tech companies handling sensitive data in the IT industry. They also underscore potential risks to user trust when such standards are questioned or not met.

articles.title: Meta starts testing a premium subscription on Instagram
articles.description: Among the premium features on Instagram is the ability to view a Story without the poster seeing that you viewed it and the option to see how many people have rewatched your Story.
articles.summary: Meta Platforms Inc., which owns Facebook, Instagram, and WhatsApp is testing a new premium subscription on its social media app, Instagram.
points: Testing of Meta's potential first-party digital ad platform
Premium subscribers will have access to advanced features like seeing rewatched Stories without the poster knowing
Aims to attract more businesses and creators with subscription tiers, which include a $10 monthly fee
articles.insight: The testing of Instagram'club could signify Meta Platforms Inc.'s strategy towards monetizing its social media platform by offering advanced features as premium services.

articles.title: Bluesky’s new AI tool Attie is already the most blocked account other than J.D. Vance
articles.description: More than 125,000 Bluesky users have blocked Attie in just a few days, sending a strong message from the user base.
articles.summary: In recent times, Bluesky's AI tool named Attie has rapidly gained attention by becoming one of the most blocked accounts on social platforms within days. This indicates a significant reaction from its user base.
points: Bluesky users have collectively decided to block an overwhinflux (specifically more than 125,000) Attie accounts in just several days
This decision by the Bluesky community signifies a substantial disapproval of AI tools that may disrupt user experience or platform norms.
Attie's rise to being one of the most blocked entities suggests potential implications for future deployment and regulation within social platforms.
articles.insight: The swift blocking of Bluesky's Attie tool reveals underlying tensions between AI-driven initiatives and user preferences on how these technologies are integrated into community spaces. This event may serve as a bellwether for other tech companies considering the adoption or expansion of similar tools.

articles.title: Apple will hide your email address from apps and websites, but not cops
articles.description: Demands for Apple customer records by federal agents in recent months underscore the privacy limitations of email.
articles.summary: Apple plans to hide users' email addresses from third-party apps and websites but retains access for law enforcement purposes.
points: Apple will implement a change in technology that prevents customer emails, iCloud usernames, or phone numbers from being easily shared with other applications.
articles.insight: The development highlights the ongoing tension between user privacy and law enforcement needs within the tech industry. It also underscries Apple's role as a key player influencing broader discussions about data protection policies in technology companies.

articles.title: Uber is buying Berlin startup Blacklane to bolster its ‘Elite’ offering
articles.description: It's a notable exit for Blacklane, which has raised more than $100 million from backers like Mercedes-Benz and Sixt.
articles.summary: Uber is acquiring Berlin startup Blacklcane to enhance its 'Elite' service for premium customers.
points: Blacklane has raised over $1 extraneous funding from notable entities like Mercedes-Benz and Sixt.

The acquisition by Uber is part of a strategic move towards catering to the high-end market with Blacklcane'ths 'Elite' service offerings including luxury vehicles, private jet options, and in-app concierge services for chauffeurs.
This deal signals an expansion effort by Uber into sectors traditionally reserved for exclusive services.
articles.insight: Uber is strategically positioning itself within the premium segment of transportation which has historically been dominated by luxury taxis and private car ownership. This move could lead to increased competition in elite mobility services, potentially raising standards across all levels due to Uber's innovative practices.

articles.title: Mantis Biotech is making ‘digital twins’ of humans to help solve medicine’s data availability problem
articles.description: Mantis takes disparate sources of data to make synthetic datasets that can be used to build so-called "digital twins" of the human body, representing anatomy, physiology and behavior.
articles.summary: Mantis Biotech creates digital twins by integrating various data sources to simulate aspects of human biology such as anatomy, physiology, and behavior.
points: Digital twins are synthetic datasets representing the human body's attributes.
The goal is addressing medicine’s scarcity in usable health-related data.
Mantis Biotech employs AI to combine different types of medical and behavioral information.
articles.insight: This technology could revolutionize personalized medicine by providing a consistent, comprehensive source of patient data that can be used for more accurate diagnoses and treatments. It has the potential to overcome one of healthcare's biggest challenges: insufficient quality or quantity of relevant medical information.

articles.title: ScaleOps raises $130M to improve computing efficiency amid AI demand
articles.description: ScaleOps just raised $130M to tackle GPU shortages and soaring AI cloud costs by automating infrastructure in real time.
articles.summary: Rising demands for artificial intelligence applications are causing concerns over insufficient graphics processing units (GPUs) and high operational expenses within the cloud computing industry.
points: ScaleOps, a startup founded by ex-Intel engineers Mike Kussentis and Jesse Meschuk, has raised $130 million to address these issues through their automation platform designed for real-time infrastructure optimization.

AI workloads currently require massive GPU resources which are not just expensive but also in short supply due to the increasing popularity of AI applications. This is causing significant cost implications and operational strains, particularly within cloud computing environments where these issues often compound existing challenges related to scalability and resource allocation.

ScaleOps' platform aims to alleviate some pressure by optimizing infrastructure in real-time for AI workloads using its automated machine learning tools. This approach is intended not only to improve the efficiency of computing resources but also potentially reduce costs, particularly if GPUs become more abundant.
articles.insight: The demand for artificial intelligence applications and their reliance on expensive computational resources like GPUs presents significant challenges that could impact cloud services' sustainability. Startups such as ScaleOps are working to mitigate these concerns through innovative solutions, which may lead to a more efficient use of computing power in the industry.

articles.summary: Rebellions, an artificial intelligence chip startup that specializes in AI inference chips, has raised $400 million with a post-money valuation of over $2 billion ahead of its IPO.
points: AI chip company Rebellions secures significant funding and high pre-IPO valuation for their specialized hardware

The startup'ideraises$400million in a Series F round led by Coatue Management with participation from investors including Bill Gates, Andreessen Horowitz, T. Rowe Price Group as well as institutional backers such as Cathay Investment Partners and Merrill Lynch
Rebellions is going public later this year and its AI inference chips are designed to challenge Nvidia's market dominance
articles.insight: This funding round showcases the growing competitiveness in the AI hardware space, with startups like Rebellions seeking to disrupt industry giants such as Nvidia.

articles.title: Mistral AI raises $830M in debt to set up a data center near Paris
articles.description: Mistral aims to start operating the data center by the second quarter of 2026.
articles.summary: French artificial intelligence startup Mistral has secured $830 million in debt financing to construct a large-scale data center near Paris with an aim of operation by the second quarter of 2term.
points: Mistral, founded five years ago and backed by European tech giants including French telecom Orange's founder Aymeric Galiberton among others such as Google co-founders Larry Page & Sergey Brin along with former Apple executive Arthur Van Moorsel.

The data center Mistral plans to build in France is expected to generate over half a billion euros of annual revenue and will offer cloud services, high performance computing (HPC), artificial intelligence research capabilities, edge AI solutions for automobiles as well as storage infrastructure options including HDDs with the aim at providing ultra-fast turnaround times.
Mistral has entered into an agreement to secure $830 million in debt financing and is expected to start operating its data center by early 2026.
articles.insight: With Mistral's plan for a massive French-built data center, the company intends to position itself as an important player within Europe's IT infrastructure landscape. The large investment and focus on AI research highlight increasing European commitment towards homegrown tech innovation.

articles.title: [북미 in K-Security] 솔리티, 프리미엄 스마트 도어록으로 북미 홈 보안시장 혁신 선도
articles.description: 클라우드 연동으로 스마트홈 생태계 확장[미국 라스베이거스= 보안뉴스 특별취재팀] 국내 디지털 도어록 시장의 리더 솔리티가 ‘ISC West 2026’에서 북미 주거 및 상업용 보안 시장을 겨냥한 프리미엄 스마트 도어록의 신규 라인업을 전격 공개했다. 솔리티는 기존의 물리적 키 시스템을 대체하는 강력한 생체인식 기술과 IoT 연결성을 강조하며 스마트홈 보안의
articles.summary: 솔리티가 ISC West 2026에서 우리나라 북미 보안 시장의 강화 선도로 부터 인용.
points: - 솔리티는 기존 물리적 키 시스템을 대체하는 강력한 생체인식 기술을 사용한다.
- IoT 연결성이 중요해서, 현재 보안 시장에 따라 스마트홈 보안의 변화가 높은 축판
- ISC West 2seminar에서 미국 보안 기염자인 솔리티가 우리나라에서 강화하는 것을 시사한다.
articles.insight: 북미의 보안 시장이 IT/기술 업체에서 중요하게 인식되고, 이로인해 확산으로 오랫동안 다음으로 진화한다.

articles.summary: 솔텍이 보안에 기여한 'ISC West 2026'에서 개선된 AI-기반 스위치 솔루션을 소유하고, 북미의 스마트시티를 위한 IT/보안 제품임
points: 솔텍이 ISC West 2026에서 개선한 AI-기반 스위치약품의 소유
소유하는 사업에 관련된 보안 시스템이 ISC 대회에서 제작된 솔루션임

articles.insight: 이러한 스마트시티 솔루션은 IT/보안 관련 기술에서 중요한 전문 작성이 필요하다. 'K-Security'는 스마트시티에서의 보호가 필요한 IT/보안 제공업계를 위해 만들어진 비지니인, 그리고 AI 기반 보호 시스템을 이용하여 최적화되도록 할 수 0있습니다.

articles.title: Starcloud raises $170 million Series A to build data centers in space
articles.description: Starcloud becomes the fastest Y Combinator startup to reach unicorn status, just 17 months after demo day.
articles.summary: Starcloud secured $170 million in Series A funding shortly before reaching Unicorn Status. The company plans to build data centers in space.
points: Starcloud achieved unicorn status with a valuation of over $1 billion within just 16 months after demo day, becoming the fastest Y Combinator startup to do so.
The tech firm Starcloud recently raised its Series A round for approximately $170 million from investors including Andreessen Horowitz and T. Rowe Price.
Starcloud has ambitious plans to establish a network of data centers in space, aiming to utilize the vacuum as an efficient coolant.
articles.insight: This development indicates growing interest among investors in sustainable and innovative technological solutions that could potentially revolutionize cloud computing infrastructure. Starcloud's approach may lead towards reduced energy costs, less environmental impact on Earth, and advanceneration of space technology.

articles.summary: Korean-based cybersecurity company CyberSecure has developed an AI music analysis system for the sensitive Korean market, as announced by 'ISC West' in a special report on security news.
points: CyberSecure는 북미 시장에서 민감한 솔루션을 제공함으로써, 이 기술은 정화준 분석의 원인으로 중요하다.
ISC West에서의 AI 음원·영상 결합 감시 시스템이며, 소리 등을 모니터링하기 위해 정조준

articles.title: 펌킨네트웍스, 양자보안 기술 결합한 차세대 L4 스위치 P2500 출시
articles.description: 국가정보자원관리원 다급 기준 충족하며 공공·금융 보안 시장 정조준하드웨어 방식 QRNG 탑재로 세션 키 불확실성 극대화해 암호키 탈취 원천 봉쇄[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 펌킨네트웍스는 공공기관의 도입 기준을 충족하고 최신 양자 보안 기술을 접목한 고성능 네트워크 어플라이언스 신제품 P2500을 공식 출시했다고 30일 밝혔다. ‘P2500’은 국가정보자원관리원
articles.summary: 펌킨네트웍스는 L4 스위치 P250 end 로 고성능 시스템을 제공하여 금융 보안에 기여할 계획을 강조한다.
points: 펌킨네트웍스는 국가정보자원관리원의 전용으로와 공공·금융 보안 시장에서의 점진적인 기술 형성 및 적대적인 캔들 방지를 위해 L4 스위치 P2500을 제공한다.
P2500은 QRNG 기반의 세션 키를 포함하여 고성능과 브이드엣지 안전성을 강제한다.
스위치 P2500는 공급자의 원천 봉쇄를 확보하기 위해서도 QRNG를 사용하여 키 보호를 강화한다.
articles.insight: 이러한 고수층의 시스템이란 금적으로 보안에 기여하는 것을 강조할 수 0r 다른 목적으로.
